holy_boss.description: Holy Boss — Dominant sativa, intense. Collectibles at Tarumba's Farm.

lady_cupcake.description: Lady Cupcake — Sweet balanced hybrid. Collectibles at Tarumba's Farm.

nitro_bud.description: Nitro Bud — Fast easy autoflower. Collectibles at Tarumba's Farm.

toxic_mutant.description: Toxic Mutant — Dense resinous indica genetics. Collectibles at Tarumba's Farm.

holy_boss.subtitle: It won't warn you twice
holy_boss.lead: The extreme cerebral monster. It doesn't seek comfort. It seeks intensity, mental height, and a certain sense of overflow.
holy_boss.p1: It doesn't come to bless you.
holy_boss.p2: It comes to put you on top and see if you can take it.
holy_boss.p3: Holy Boss opens the head fast, brings clarity at first, then tightens.
holy_boss.p4: It has boss presence, incense smoke, and an energy that doesn't accompany: it commands.
holy_boss.p5: Not everyone is ready for this creature.
holy_boss.p6: Holy Boss climbs fast and doesn't warn you twice.
holy_boss.p7: The plant is taller, more demanding, with a sharper profile than the rest.
holy_boss.p8: It hits the head with clarity and euphoria, but if you stay too long it can get intense.
holy_boss.p9: Citrus aroma with incense background and a mental hit that doesn't fit those seeking rest or comfort.
holy_boss.p10: First it lights up. Then it tightens.
holy_boss.spec_lead: Dominant sativa, potent and intense. Lots of head, little smoothness. Not for beginners.
holy_boss.c1: Dominant sativa: lots of head, little smoothness; not for novices
holy_boss.c2: Taller plant and more demanding grow than the rest of the line
holy_boss.c3: Citrus aroma with incense background; sharp clear profile
holy_boss.c4: Strong euphoria and mental stimulation; built for intensity, not to switch off
holy_boss.s3d: Useful in active moments if you dose well.
holy_boss.s4d: If you overdo it, it tightens. Experienced users.
holy_boss.crit3: Chosen for mental height and demand
holy_boss.made_for: Experienced users · Intense creativity · Active moments · Focus · Not for relaxing

dare.text: Not everyone can wear the crown.

lady_cupcake.subtitle: Sweet but not soft
lady_cupcake.lead: The sweet monster of the collection. It seduces through profile, flavour, and pleasant sensation—not violence or saturation.
lady_cupcake.p1: Lady Cupcake enters smooth, but it's not soft.
lady_cupcake.p2: It has a sweet creamy profile, very resinous buds, and well-balanced potency. It doesn't play KO or hyperactivity: it sits in a more comfortable, enveloping, easier-to-enjoy spot. It relaxes, lifts mood, and stays with you without getting heavy like a pure indica. It's one of those genetics that don't attack: they surround.
lady_cupcake.spec_lead: Balanced hybrid, sweet and potent. Relaxes without crushing and leaves a very enjoyable feel.
lady_cupcake.s4d: Come down without disappearing. Calm social.
lady_cupcake.crit3: Chosen for enjoyment, balance, and resin presence
lady_cupcake.made_for: Come down without disappearing · After work · Quiet enjoyment · Gentle social use · Relax without checking out

dare.text: It won't floor you. It wraps around you.

nitro_bud.subtitle: Fast and no drama
nitro_bud.lead: The fast monster. Less brutal than Toxic Mutant, but more agile, more practical, and much easier to tame.
nitro_bud.p1: It grows on its own. It runs on its own. It hits fast.
nitro_bud.p2: It's not the strongest… but it's the smartest.
nitro_bud.p3: It grabs you, brings you down, and leaves you floating before you notice.
nitro_bud.p4: Nitro Bud gets to the point.
nitro_bud.p5: It grows on its own, flowers on its own, and responds well even when you don't have much skill.
nitro_bud.p6: Fast cycle, contained size, and very simple logic: do its job well without complicating your life.
nitro_bud.p7: The effect relaxes but doesn't floor you. It lowers revs, sorts the body a bit, and lets you keep functioning.
nitro_bud.p8: It's not the wildest in the collection. It's the smartest.
nitro_bud.spec_lead: Fast, easy, efficient autoflower. Ideal for hassle-free growing and functional use.
nitro_bud.c1: Fast autoflower: less hand-holding, more result per cycle
nitro_bud.c2: Medium-compact size: fits small spaces without drama
nitro_bud.c3: Functional effect: loosens the body without fully knocking you out
nitro_bud.c4: Sweet smooth aroma; contained efficient structure
nitro_bud.s1d: Balance without KO. Keeps pace with the day.
nitro_bud.s4d: Ideal for small spaces and novice growers.
nitro_bud.crit3: Chosen for speed, simplicity, and results
nitro_bud.made_for: Daily use · Novice growers · Small spaces · Fast grows · Use without getting KO'd

toxic_mutant.subtitle: Not for everyone
toxic_mutant.lead: The heavy monster of the collection. Compact, dense, and sticky. It doesn't stand out for flash—it stands out for punch.
toxic_mutant.p1: This creature doesn't come to play.
toxic_mutant.p2: It enters slow… and before you know it, you're stuck in its green swamp.
toxic_mutant.p3: The body sinks, the mind fades… and everything turns dense, sticky, deep.
toxic_mutant.p4: Toxic Mutant doesn't enter making noise. It enters slowly, settles in, and shuts your system down without asking.
toxic_mutant.p5: It's a strong, stable, no-nonsense plant. Compact, tough, with dense resin-loaded buds. The aroma profile goes classic: earth, sweet undertone, that old-school feel that never fails. The effect starts loosening the body and ends switching the mind off. It's not built to run. It's built to stop.
toxic_mutant.spec_lead: Dominant indica genetics, compact and resinous. High yield, deep direct body effect.
toxic_mutant.c4: Earthy aroma with sweet old-school touch
toxic_mutant.s1d: Deep, straight to the body. No rush.
toxic_mutant.s2d: Extra gravity. Rest settles in on its own.
toxic_mutant.s3d: Progressive. Fades the noise bit by bit.
toxic_mutant.s4d: Slow but clear. Built to stop, not to run.
toxic_mutant.crit3: Chosen for hit, resin, and presence
toxic_mutant.made_for: End of day · Total relaxation · Shut off mental noise · Deep rest

dare.text: The party happens on the inside.
